message:
fix(freeze): use stack for for-of iterator tracking to support nested loops

Previously for-of loops used a single `for_of_iter_base` variable to track
the iterator position. This caused issues with nested for-of loops where
the inner loop would overwrite the outer loop's iterator position.

Changes:
- Convert `for_of_iter_base` to `for_of_iter_stack[8]` with `for_of_depth`
- `for_of_start`: push iterator position onto stack
- `for_of_next`: read iterator position from stack top
- `iterator_close`: use position from stack top, then pop

Applied to all three codegen paths:
- zig_codegen_full.zig main path
- zig_codegen_full.zig fallback path
- zig_codegen_relooper.zig
